parameters.name: Start-up delay before enabling oil pressure alerts (Oil Temp)
parameters.description: Duration of time after the engine starts before oil pressure alerting is enabled.

parameters.name: Minimum RPM threshold for alerting low oil pressure
parameters.description: Minimum RPM at which a low oil pressure warning will be allowed.

parameters.name: Critical oil pressure alert delay time
parameters.description: A critical oil pressure condition must exist for this length of time before alerting & limiting RPM (if enabled)

parameters.name: Enable oil pressure sensor
parameters.description: Switch to enable the use of an oil pressure sensor (requires license)

parameters.name: Fuel Scalar Interpolation (Map 1)
parameters.description: Blend % between fuel scalar tables for a given ethanol content

parameters.name: Fuel Scalar Interpolation (Map 2)
parameters.description: Blend % between fuel scalar tables for a given ethanol content

parameters.name: Fuel Scalar Interpolation (Map 3)
parameters.description: Blend % between fuel scalar tables for a given ethanol content

parameters.name: Fuel Scalar Interpolation (Map 4)
parameters.description: Blend % between fuel scalar tables for a given ethanol content

parameters.name: Enable RPM limit during critical oil pressure
parameters.description: Setting this parameter to 1 will enable an RPM limiter (defined by the RPM limit during oil pressure limp mode table) when oil pressure drops below the critical threshold.

parameters.name: Number of Hold Segments (720* crk rotation)
Cooldown Segments (720* crk rotation) Before Next Enrichment Allowed

Minimum warning pressure (RPM x Oil Temp)
parameters.description: Minimum oil pressure at which a warning (yellow) will occur

parameters.name: Minimum critical pressure (RPM x Oil Temp)
parameters.description: Minimum oil pressure at which a critical (red) warning and RPM limiting will occur (if enabled)

parameters.name: RPM limit during oil pressure limp mode
parameters.description: If the RPM limp mode is enabled this is the RPM the engine will be limited to during a low oil pressure event.

Fuel Target Adder (Warmup)
parameters.description: KF_DLAWUP - This table adds to the Fuel (Main) AFR target during engine warmup.

parameters.name: Fuel Target Adder (Warmup-ZSK)
parameters.description: KF_DLAWUP_ZSK - This table adds to the Fuel (Main) AFR target during engine warmup.

parameters.name: Load Change Positive Threshold (ECT)
parameters.description: KL_DRKMIN_POS - This is the same thing as Load Change Positive Threshold but with coolant temperature influence.

parameters.name: Load Change Negative Threshold (ECT)
parameters.description: KL_DRKMAX_NEG - This is the same thing as Load Change Negative Threshold but with coolant temperature influence.

parameters.name: Positive Low-Pass Filter
parameters.description: KF_KRKINST_POS - This defines how quickly a positive enrichment is applied. A higher value is faster while a lower value is slower.

parameters.name: Negative Low-Pass Filter
parameters.description: KF_KRKINST_NEG - This defines how quickly a negative enrichment (enleanment)  is applied. A higher value is faster while a lower value is slower.

parameters.name: Positive Component
parameters.description: KF_FRKINST_POS - This is a multiplier for the change in load target (Drk_soll) and is the main component for acceleration enrichment.

parameters.name: Negative Component
parameters.description: KF_FRKINST_NEG - This is a multiplier for the change in load target (Drk_soll) and is the main component for decel enleanment.

parameters.name: Load Change Gradient Filter 1
parameters.description: K_ZKRKSOLL1 - This low-pass filter is used to generate Drk_soll from Rf_soll/Rk_soll.

parameters.name: Load Change Gradient Filter 2
parameters.description: K_ZKRKSOLL2 - This low-pass filter is used to generate Drk_soll from Rf_soll/Rk_soll.

parameters.name: Load Change Positive Threshold
parameters.description: K_DRKMIN_POS - This is the minimum positive load change (Drk_soll) threshold for activating acceleration enrichment.

parameters.name: Load Change Negative Threshold
parameters.description: K_DRKMAX_NEG - This is the maximum negative load change (Drk_soll) threshold for activating decel enleanment.
